Benefits

Reduce call center operational costs

Provide instant customer support

Improve customer satisfaction

Reduce agent workload



2. AI Chatbot Solutions

We develop advanced AI chatbots powered by Agentic AI and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to automate communication across websites, messaging platforms, and mobile applications.

These chatbots can perform complex tasks rather than simply answering scripted questions.

Our Chatbot Solutions

This chatbot allows customers to easily schedule appointments through conversation.

Customer Query Handling Chatbot

This chatbot is designed to handle large volumes of customer inquiries automatically.

Capabilities include:

Answering product or service questions

Providing company policy information

Troubleshooting basic issues

Escalating complex queries to human agents when needed


3. Bangla Speech AI (STT & TTS)

Appointment Booking Chatbot

This chatbot allows customers to easily schedule appointments through conversation.

Capabilities include:

Finding available time slots

Selecting service providers or doctors

Booking appointments

Confirming reservations

Integrating with scheduling systems


This solution is ideal for:

Hospitals

Clinics

Service centers

Consultation businesses




E-commerce Product Ordering Chatbot

This AI agent helps customers browse and order products through a conversational interface.

Capabilities include:

Product search and recommendations

Order placement

documents.page_content:
AI Solutions & Capabilities Overview of iHelpBD



Transforming Business Operations with Artificial Intelligence

Our AI Department is dedicated to developing intelligent solutions that help organizations automate operations, improve customer engagement, and extract meaningful insights from data. We design and deploy advanced AI systems using technologies such as Agentic AI, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Speech AI, and Conversational AI.
